rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.0014 governs parental involvement in school disciplinary placements. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may adopt a policy for parental involvement in school disciplinary placements.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this school discipline statute.
